ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the restaurant is located */,
  "href" TEXT /* Yelp link for the restaurant */,
  "img" TEXT /* URL to the restaurant's image */,
  "star_rating" REAL /* Star rating of the restaurant */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the restaurant has received */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location coordinates of the restaurant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the restaurant's cuisine */,
  "price_range" INTEGER /* Price range of the restaurant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the restaurant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the restaurant */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the restaurant */,
  "special_offers" TEXT /* Special offers or promotions */,
  "menu_link" TEXT /* Link to the restaurant's menu */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the restaurant is verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the restaurant's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restaurants_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES restaurant_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified user */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "reported" INTEGER /* Whether the review has been reported for violations */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Restaurant's response to the review */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the restaurant responded to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, restaurant owner, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
column_names: Neighborhood where the restaurant is located
Number of reviews the restaurant has received
Contact phone number of the restaurant
Date and time when the restaurant was added to the system
Date and time when the restaurant's information was last updated

Date and time when the user account was created
